title: On graph algebras from interval maps
author_string: Carlos Correia Ramos, Nuno Martins, Paulo R. Pinto
abstract: We produce and study a family of representations of relative graph algebras on Hilbert spaces that arise from the orbits of points of one dimensional dynamical systems, where the underlying Markov interval maps $f$ have escape sets. We identify when such representations are faithful in terms of the transitions to the escape subintervals.
comment: A final version will appear in Annals of Functional Analysis
